g.text: Signal-weighted 0–100 score from live public web evidence
Sourced signals with dates and clickable links to original pages
Academic Medical Center · New York, NY
🧪 Phase III Lu-177 PSMA trial open — 340 enrollments · clinicaltrials.gov · Jan 2025
🏗️ $180M Nuclear Medicine Center investment announced · mskcc.org · Mar 2025
💼 12 open roles: Nuclear Medicine Physicist, RPT Coordinator · linkedin.com · Apr 2025
Active trial + facility investment = peak readiness window before volume ramp
Request intro to Nuclear Medicine Chief via RPT trial PI — timing is optimal
⚙️ 4 new SPECT/CT systems + dedicated hot lab suite commissioned · mayoclinic.org
📋 FDA IND approval granted for Ac-225 PSMA program · Jan 2025
IND approval + new equipment signals immediate clinical expansion readiness
Academic Medical Center · San Francisco, CA
💰 $42M NIH grant for Theranostics Research Center · nih.gov
🏗️ 8,000 sq ft RPT Center groundbreaking at Mission Bay campus · ucsf.edu
